title: Le tonnerre de Dieu
writer: Bernard Clavel, Denys de La Patellière, Pascal Jardin
actors: Jean Gabin, Michèle Mercier, Robert Hossein
plot: Léandre Brassac is a misanthrope and alcoholic, who lives on a large remote county estate with his wife, Marie. Brassac has a reputation as a violent and unpredictable man, but who has a love for animals, particularly dogs.
